title: DROPZILLA
summary: A shock jock's sample deck: banked sound pads on a hardware-style device with FX knobs, a censor bleep, and a performance looper. 36 farts live on as bank one: GAS.

admin.notes:
Born 2026-07-12 as The Toot Suite; reimagined 2026-07-15 as DROPZILLA, a shock-jock sampler device. 2026-07-16: bank one refreshed as GAS (James's new 36, assets/audio/gas/); drift exits temporarily commented out. Future banks will add R-rated language — update warnings when they land. Audio via ElevenLabs SFX API.
